prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `9f27f097`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 package for `9f27f097`. The rule is: find the only non-background source rectangle, take its left-right mirror, and paint that mirrored pattern into the same-sized black rectangle while leaving everything else unchanged. I used the summary hint only after checking it against the official examples; it was consistent, so no `notes.md` or `dsl_ext` change was needed.

The verifier in [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9f27f097/verifier.py#L4) keeps the RE-ARC style by extracting the two foreground objects and mirroring the source subgrid into the zero block. The generator in [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9f27f097/generator.py#L85) stays close to the family: fixed `12x12` background-dominant grids, one dense two-color source rectangle, one same-sized zero rectangle, no distractor noise, and an optional whole-grid top/bottom flip to cover the observed upper/lower placement variants. Official verification passed `4/4`, the build produced 1000 examples, generated verification passed `1000/1000`, and I sanity-checked the preview output.

Task package: [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9f27f097/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9f27f097/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_9f27f097/generator.py)

Artifacts: [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9f27f097/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9f27f097/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9f27f097/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9f27f097/previews/preview_02.png), [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/9f27f097/previews/preview_03.png)
